overall.description: A static nighttime scene of a rooftop bonfire gathering in a futuristic urban setting, with illuminated twin towers visible in the background. Several people are seated and standing around a large central fire, with makeshift wind turbines and industrial elements decorating the rooftop. The footage exhibits game engine aesthetics with dramatic blue-green color grading and firelight illumination.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a rooftop bonfire gathering at night, with the Petronas Towers glowing in the distant background. Several people are gathered around the central fire, some seated on chairs and others standing, while makeshift wind turbines stand silhouetted against the blue night sky. The scene is illuminated by the warm firelight contrasting with the cool ambient city glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a futuristic rooftop gathering under a deep blue night sky. It begins with a wide view of a central bonfire, where the warm, flickering orange light casts long shadows across a group of people seated and standing in a circle. As the eye moves toward the horizon, the intimate glow of the fire contrasts with the cool, ambient luminescence of the city. The scene then expands to reveal the silhouette of makeshift wind turbines and industrial rooftop elements, all framed against the distant, glowing spires of the Petronas Towers.
